panels.title: อุณหภูมิเฉลี่ยรายวัน — ทุกจังหวัด

targets.rawSql: SELECT data_date AS time, AVG(temp_avg) AS "Thailand Avg", MAX(temp_max) AS "Max" FROM mart.daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(data_date::timestamp) GROUP BY data_date ORDER BY data_date

panels.title: 10 จังหวัดร้อนที่สุดวันนี้

targets.rawSql: SELECT province_name AS metric, temp_avg AS "Temp (°C)" FROM mart.daily_summary WHERE data_date = CURRENT_DATE - 1 ORDER BY temp_avg DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: ปริมาณฝนสะสมรายวัน (mm)

targets.rawSql: SELECT data_date AS time, SUM(total_precipitation) AS "Total Rain (mm)", AVG(total_precipitation) AS "Avg Rain" FROM mart.daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(data_date::timestamp) GROUP BY data_date ORDER BY data_date

panels.title: อุณหภูมิเฉลี่ยแต่ละภาค

targets.rawSql: SELECT region AS metric, ROUND(AVG(temp_avg)::numeric,1) AS "Avg Temp" FROM mart.daily_summary WHERE data_date = CURRENT_DATE - 1 GROUP BY region ORDER BY region
SELECT data_date, step, provinces_total, provinces_ok, records_inserted, status, ROUND(duration_sec,1) AS duration_sec, created_at FROM mart.pipeline_run_log ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
